root-question.text: Does the agent take any irreversible action (prod write, payment, send, delete)?

question.text: Are those actions gated by a named human checkpoint?
Is there a deterministic success signal for autonomous segments?

branch.conclusion: Ship autonomous between gates; human checkpoint at each irreversible step.
Escalate — autonomous loop without success signal and with irreversible actions is too risky.
Add human checkpoint before any irreversible call; do not ship without it.
Ship fully autonomous; iteration caps + idempotent tools.
Sandbox first; never run code execution without isolation.

example.p: irreversible=false (local branch only) → sandboxed=true (docker) → conclusion: ship-autonomous.
